description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI-Windows that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow also allows for manual dispatch. It uses a Windows 2019 environment with a 120-minute timeout and runs a matrix of four jobs with different Qt and architecture configurations. For each job, it checks out the repository, initializes submodules, caches Qt, installs Qt, creates a build directory, clones OpenSSL, configures and builds the project, packages the project and installer, archives artifacts, updates tags, and releases continuous builds.
